root: ^Norman: Blue Cod, huh? My pals used to see those so much more... Got poached to ablivion and now you barely see them.
^Norman: Some businessman found out you could make jewelry with them, and everyone started netting them by the dozen at night.
^Norman: Totally destroyed the population... Now they're a pretty rare sight.
^Sam: Aww... what happened to the jeweler?
^Norman: Ran out of supply, so I guess he went and found something else to make his stones with.
^Sam: Huh... sounds like a bit of a strange guy...
